summary: gRPC load-balanced end-to-end via L4Route (TCP); GRPCRoute control plane reconciled but its L7 data plane RST_STREAMs (informational) — see Description

assertions.description: grpcurl installed in FRR pod (SHA-256 verified)
grpcurl list via Gateway (informational, RST_STREAM expected)

assertions.description: grpcurl list via L4Route Gateway returns grpcbin.GRPCBin (gRPC works over L4)
grpcurl unary grpcbin.GRPCBin/Index via L4Route returns 'gRPC testing server'
